name: EdwDmProvDirDmFcltyTypCtExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT A.SRC_SYS_CD, B.PROV_FCLTY_TYP_CD AS FCLTY_TYP_CD, A.NTWK_ID, COUNT(DISTINCT A.PROV_ID) AS PROV_CT FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.PROV_NTWK_D A JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.PROV_D B ON A.PROV_ID = B.PROV_ID JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.NTWK_D C ON A.NTWK_ID = C.NTWK_ID WHERE A.SRC_SYS_CD = 'FACETS' AND C.NTWK_DIR_CD IN ('ALLDIR','WEBDIR') AND A.PROV_NTWK_DIR_IN = 'Y' AND A.PROV_NTWK_EFF_DT_SK <= @{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate} AND A.PROV_NTWK_TERM_DT_SK > @{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate} AND B.PROV_TERM_DT_SK > @{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate} AND B.PROV_ENTY_CD = 'FCLTY' AND A.PROV_SK NOT IN (0,1) GROUP BY A.SRC_SYS_CD, B.PROV_FCLTY_TYP_CD, A.NTWK_ID) SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, FCLTY_TYP_CD, NTWK_ID, PROV_CT FROM cte

PROCESSING:   Retrieves the data from EDW PROV_NTWK_D table and loads into the Web Provider Directory database
